text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've come to the training track.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, I feel great! The next race will spell a
mighty victory for Teio for sure!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's not even race day, yet you already feel
victorious? Curious.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Prez! You know it! I won't settle for anything
less than total domination!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
After all, my dream is to be the number one
Umamusume that everyone cheers for...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which means there's no way I can afford to lose
now!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A courageous venture. Your warrior's spirit is a
powerful weapon. I'm sure you will do splendidly.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. Glad to have your seal of approval!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, do not forget about the
concert. It is important you show your gratitude
to your fans and—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! The concert! I totally forgot about it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll be doing my famous Teio Step center stage!
You better be in the audience!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No one will be able to keep their eyes off me
dancing in my signature racewear! I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So, I've gotta keep practicin'! See ya later, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get a chance to tell her not to get ahead
of herself and slack off on her lessons...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Goodness. She won't stay calm for even a second.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems both flustered yet
impressed by Tokai Teio's impulsiveness.
